category_sources: source_facts.description says "Computer algebra system"; official Maxima homepage describes symbolic and numerical expression manipulation.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is "Maxima, a Computer Algebra System"; source_facts.name is maxima.
docs_sources: Official Maxima homepage navigation links to Documentation; official site hosts the Maxima manual PDF.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Maxima homepage says full source code is available using Git and links to the SourceForge code repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a computer algebra system; official homepage lists algebra, calculus, matrices, plotting, and terminal/front-end usage.
